title: Emails & Activities in monday work management directs to CRM
excerpt:
When I add Emails & Activities in de Updates section of a board I get a redirect to monday.com CRM. 
Is there a way to use this feature without CRM? 
Thanks, 
Mark

posts.author: markvhussen (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I add Emails & Activities in de Updates section of a board I get a redirect to monday.com CRM.

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml: you can buy this feature separately by contacting the support team

posts.author: SueS (Sue Shepherd)
posts.cookedHtml: @markvhussen Hi Mark. Did you get a reply to your query? I am having the same issue. I have Work Management Pro and can’t activate the Emails and Activities widget.

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mark and Sue,

Emails and Activities is currently exclusive to the monday CRM product. If you have the Work Management product, you will need to purchase the CRM product in order to access and use the Emails and Activities feature. This will be an additional cost to your current plan payment as you are adding a second product, which you can learn more about here: How to install monday CRM > About monday products.

However, you can start a free trial of the CRM product to test out the product’s features before making a decision to purchase! Please let me know if you have any additional questions.
